g.text: We use cookies to enhance your
Required for the site to function
As a first-time visitor, I need to be informed about cookie
usage before any non-essential cookies are set.
As a privacy-conscious user, I need to control exactly
which types of cookies are used.
As a returning user, I need my cookie preferences
remembered so I don't reconfigure on every visit.
As a user who changed my mind, I need to access
and modify my cookie preferences at any time.
As a user exercising my GDPR (Data Protection) rights,
I need to export all data stored about me.
As a user exercising my GDPR (Data Protection) rights,
I need to request deletion of my data.
